denials.name: parinamate
denials.cite: mind-word and breath-word are not successive entities handed a baton but one power viewed at two stations, its 'motion' from one to the other being appearance, not transit

claims.name: vivartate
claims.cite: turning itself about in the places of articulation, attains differentiation

rejected_readings.label: dualist_hand_off
rejected_readings.rendering: The vital power in the breath and the intellectual power in the intellect are two distinct forces that successively coordinate in producing differentiated speech.
rejected_readings.why: Treats the two stations as separate powers rather than expressions of one sakti. The commentary explicitly forecloses this dualist misreading: 'mind-word and breath-word are not successive entities handed a baton but one power viewed at two stations.'

rejected_readings.label: real_transformation
rejected_readings.rendering: The power actually transforms and modifies as it moves from the intellect to the breath to the articulation places, producing real changes in its own substance.
rejected_readings.why: Asserts parinama (real transformation) rather than vivarta (appearance without change). The commentary rules this out explicitly: 'its motion from one to the other being appearance, not transit.'

rejected_readings.label: passive_production
rejected_readings.rendering: Differentiation is something that happens to the power as it moves through the articulation places, an inevitable process the power undergoes passively.
rejected_readings.why: Reverses the agency relation: treats the power as passively suffering differentiation rather than actively presenting it. The commentary insists: 'it is something the power *presents*, not something it suffers.' The power has agency, not passivity.

notes: 1.117 establishes sakti's non-dual presence at prana and buddhi (two inner stations) and the vivarta-based appearance of differentiation at the sthanas. The power actively presents distinction without undergoing real transformation. The contract captures the key truth: one power, two stations, appearance (not change).
